original text:
Graphic Design | Art Direction - Fashion Apparel & Branding, T Shirt Graphics Designs with an Heraldic Mood for the Brand Overend and Gurney.
Overend and Gurney is known for their aristocratic pedigree dating back to the brands formation in London, in 1800. My brief was to explore these roots in a quirky manner in keeping with O&G's ethos, and produce a bunch of graphic designs for their printed t shirt collection.
Organic cotton men's t-shirt with soft print and vintage wash.
Let me know what you think, click the button below, or leave a few words.
